components.build_cmd: cd ui && npm ci && npm run build
components.notes: Create subdomain mr-tracker.sapienoids.com in hPanel → Domains → Subdomains, then upload dist/ contents to its root folder. .htaccess in dist/ handles React Router SPA routing.
Code.gs is reference copy only — managed in Google Apps Script IDE. Not deployed from this repo.

notes: No LLM, no TTS. Pure React PWA + Google Apps Script backend.
